description: You are a pharmacologist performing a nuclear translocation assay to measure the Nuclear-to-Cytoplasmic (N/C) intensity ratio of a protein in a single cell. Using 'cell_dapi.tif' (nuclear marker) and 'cell_signal.tif' (protein signal) from ~/Fiji_Data/raw/translocation/, define a nuclear ROI and a cytoplasmic ROI consisting of a 15-pixel band surrounding the nucleus that excludes the nuclear area. Calculate the N/C ratio based on the Mean Gray Values of the protein signal within these two regions. Save the calculated ratio to ~/Fiji_Data/results/translocation/ratio_report.txt and export the ROIs to ~/Fiji_Data/results/translocation/rois.zip.
